title: 冬日街拍优雅女性出车门瞬间
author: Nano banana pro🍌
prompt: 在微雪中拍摄的一张照片，画面中是一位年轻的成年女性，她留着柔顺的中长波浪金发，被风吹得略显凌乱。她的脸庞化着淡雅的自然妆容，没有浓妆艳抹，面部光线柔和，略微侧向一边。她身材苗条，姿态优雅，正从一辆橄榄绿色的老式汽车中走出。她身穿一件舒适的浅灰色针织中长款修身连衣裙，裙摆开衩至膝盖，外面套着一件超大款的灰色人字纹羊毛大衣，腰间系着一条宽大的棕色皮带——这是一种经典、简约的街头风格。配饰方面：大衣上别着一枚镶嵌红宝石的小马形珠宝胸针，戴着黑色皮手套，手提一个柔软的黑色大皮托特包，其中一只戴手套的手上戴着一枚粗大的金戒指。从敞开的包中可以看到一根天然雪松枝、一小束红色浆果以及一个包装好的圣诞礼物的边缘。场景设定在白雪皑皑的冬季城市街道上，模糊的建筑呈现柔和的色调，营造出一种电影般的欧洲氛围。连衣裙柔软的羊毛纱线、有纹理的羊毛大衣、光滑的皮手套和皮包，以及汽车的金属部件，共同营造出一种新年将至的感觉。建筑装饰采用德国城市特有的简约风格。光线是柔和的自然日光，在略微阴沉的天空下投射出微妙的阴影，营造出一种弥漫的电影般的光泽。整体氛围舒适、优雅、富有电影感、略带怀旧、精致而又放松。相机位于腰部高度，向上仰拍，仿佛观者正站在敞开的车门旁，中景镜头捕捉了女性的上半身和部分腿部，当观者走出汽车时，重点突出其服装和姿态。拍摄风格为模拟胶片，高颗粒感，呈现出杂志街头时尚美学，使用 Kodak Portra 400 胶片拍摄。
prompt_en: A photograph taken during a light snowfall of a young adult woman with soft, medium-length, wavy blonde hair, slightly tousled by the wind, a face with natural makeup without heavy make-up, softly lit and partially turned to the side, a slender figure, and an elegant pose, stepping out of an old olive green car. She is wearing a cozy light gray knit midi-length sheath dress with a knee-length slit, over an oversized gray herringbone wool coat, cinched at the waist with a wide brown leather belt-a classic, minimalist street style. Accessories: A small horse-shaped jewelry brooch adorned with ruby stones is pinned to the coat, black leather gloves, a large soft black leather tote bag, and a chunky gold ring on one hand worn over the glove. A natural cedar branch, a sprig with red berries, and the edge of a wrapped Christmas present are visible from the open bag. The scene takes place on a snowy winter city street, with blurred buildings in muted tones creating a cinematic European atmosphere. The textures of the soft woolen yarn of the dress, the textured wool coat, the smooth leather of the gloves and bag, and the metal parts of the car create a sense of the coming New Year. The architecture is decorated in the minimalist style of German cities. The lighting is soft natural daylight with subtle shadows under a slightly overcast sky, creating a diffuse, cinematic glow. The mood is cozy, elegant, cinematic, slightly nostalgic, sophisticated, yet relaxed. The camera is positioned at waist level, looking up as if the viewer is standing at an open car door, with a medium shot capturing the upper body and part of the legs, focusing on the outfit and pose an the viewer exits the car. The style is analog film, with high grain and an editorial street fashion aesthetic, shot on Kodak Portla 400.

title: 安娜·德·阿玛斯复古时尚写真：丝绒长裙与优雅姿态
author: Yaseen Khan Gul

title: 高端产品拆解展示，悬浮组件，精密机械细节，超现实微距摄影
author: ANKIT PATEL 🇮🇳 | AI
prompt: [ {"product name" "Nintendo game"} ]，高端产品广告，白色无缝背景，爆炸图展示内部机械结构，外壳悬浮在核心上方，微型螺丝和组件悬空，暗示完美对齐导轨，清晰柔和的阴影，超现实主义，微距产品摄影，100mm 镜头效果，f/8，8k，1:1
prompt_en: [ {"product name" "Nintendo game"} ], high-end product advertising, white seamless background, exploded view with inner mechanics revealed, outer shell hovering above core, micro screws and components suspended, perfect alignment guides implied, crisp soft shadow, ultra realistic, macro product photography, 100mm lens look, f/8, 8k, 1:1

title: 微型东京星球全景视界
author: Gadgetify
prompt: 拍摄一张来自一颗直径仅约 500 米的微型宜居小行星表面的超广角照片。这颗小行星表面覆盖着一座类似东京的密集城市。由于曲率极大，地平线上的建筑物看起来与观察者完全垂直；整个城市呈环状结构，从头顶上方环绕而过，天空中布满了倒立的摩天大楼。太阳则像一颗星星一样，隐藏在头顶城市的后方。这简直就是一种极致的“鱼眼视角”现实效果。
prompt_en:
Decided to test this with Nano Banana Pro. Not bad :)
Prompt: A ultra-wide-angle photograph from the surface of a tiny, habitable planetoid, only about 500 meters in diameter, covered in a dense Tokyo-like city. The curvature is so extreme that buildings on the "horizon" are visibly perpendicular to the viewer, and the city loops entirely overhead, filling the sky with inverted skyscrapers. The sun is visible as a star behind the overhead city. The ultimate fish-eye reality.

title: 按键删除周一
author: @michaelrabone
prompt: Detailed photographic image of a miniature person in bed feeling cranky under an opened 'Delete Monday' keyboard keycap, using the inside of the keycap as a mini bedroom complete with the usual bedroom stuff
prompt_en: Detailed photographic image of a miniature person in bed feeling cranky under an opened 'Delete Monday' keyboard keycap, using the inside of the keycap as a mini bedroom complete with the usual bedroom stuff

title: 纸制玩具版本
author: @TechieBySA
prompt: 超细节渲染的[角色名称]纸制玩具版本，呈盒子形状（纸制玩具），由哑光折叠纸板制成，带有可见的纸张纹理，边缘干净，折叠整齐。头部和身体为立方体，四肢为方形，面部特征简化，采用平面印刷色彩和微妙阴影以增强深度。服装和配饰以极简几何纸艺风格忠实地模仿参考图的外观，保持紧凑比例和Q版风格。中性工作室灯光，柔和阴影，平滑背景，逼真的产品摄影效果，4K分辨率，无文字或标志。尺寸为1080x1080。
prompt_en: Ultra-detailed render of a [CHARACTER NAME] paper toy version in box form (papertoy) made from matte folded cardboard and cut with visible paper texture, clean edges and neat folds. Cubic head and body, square extremities, simplified facial features, flat printed colors and subtle shading for greater depth. The clothing and accessories faithfully imitate the appearance of the reference image in a minimalist geometric papercraft style, maintaining compact proportions and chibi style. Neutral studio lighting, soft shadows, smooth background, photorealistic product photography, 4K, no text or logos. 1080x1080 dimension.

title: 时间之神
author: TheRelianceAI
prompt: 这尊巨大的大理石雕像代表[在此处插入相应的物体或角色名称]。雕像翅膀（如适用）张开，彰显出神圣的威严；身上穿戴着华丽的金色铠甲和飘逸的巴洛克风格长袍。大理石表面布满裂纹，表面泛着柔和的光泽；胸前镶嵌着闪耀的神圣徽记。雕像矗立在璀璨的天蓝色金色圆顶之下，四周环绕着极具宗教氛围的建筑。头顶散发出神秘而庄严的神之光芒；姿态充满动感，彷佛正处于某种激烈的行动之中。整个雕塑采用极其精细的文艺复兴风格制作，光照效果极具电影质感，营造出一种宏伟而神圣的氛围。该雕像的分辨率高达8K。
prompt_en: Colossal marble statue of [INSERT OBJECT OR CHARACTER HERE], wings (if applicable) spread in divine majesty, adorned with ornate golden armor and flowing baroque robes, cracked marble textures with soft patina, glowing sacred emblem on chest, standing within a celestial golden dome, surrounded by divine architecture, dramatic god rays from above, dynamic mid-action pose, ultra-detailed renaissance sculpture style, cinematic lighting, majestic and sacred atmosphere, 8k resolution

title: 巨型瓶水倾泻供人饮用
author: Aijaz
prompt: 一个超现实的、照片般逼真的场景：一个身材矮小的成年男子赤脚蹲在一个绿色塑料瓶盖上，双手捧着从一个巨大的绿色塑料瓶口中流出的水饮用。瓶子侧卧在一个长满青苔的石壁上，不断流出清澈的水。场景设置在室外潮湿的石板路上，有浅浅的水坑、柔和的倒影，背景是模糊的郁郁葱葱的绿树。电影般的景深，自然日光，超精细纹理，逼真的水滴，奇特的比例对比，高真实感，8k 画质。
prompt_en: A surreal, photorealistic scene of a tiny adult man crouching barefoot on a green plastic bottle cap, cupping his hands to drink water pouring from the mouth of an enormous green plastic bottle. The bottle lies on its side atop a mossy stone ledge, releasing a steady stream of clear water. The setting is outdoors on a wet stone pathway with shallow puddles, soft reflections, and lush green trees blurred in the background. Cinematic depth of field, natural daylight, ultra-detailed textures, realistic water droplets, whimsical scale contrast, high realism, 8k quality.

title: Keep-style Chinese fitness page (single HTML)
author: 老白（每日干货分享✊）
prompt: Build a Keep-style Chinese fitness page with a clean, modern UI, an interactive SVG body (front/back views, where clicking a muscle highlights it), Chinese filters (gender/level/equipment), and exercise cards. Deliver it as a single HTML file using Tailwind + JavaScript.
prompt_en: Build a Keep-style Chinese fitness page with a clean, modern UI, an interactive SVG body (front/back views, where clicking a muscle highlights it), Chinese filters (gender/level/equipment), and exercise cards. Deliver it as a single HTML file using Tailwind + JavaScript.

title: 紫色饮料罐奇幻场景广告图
author: ANKIT PATEL 🇮🇳 | AI

title: 胶片质感四格写真：自然姿态与复古光影的时尚人像
author: Keskin
prompt:
一幅写实风格的编辑肖像，构图为四格网格，类似于胶片拍摄的样片。每个画面都展现了同一位年轻女性，在纯灰色影室墙前摆出略有不同的自然姿势和表情。

她拥有一头蓬松的深色秀发，随意散开，带有柔和的动感；眉毛浓密，颧骨分明，自然的魅力妆容突出了她的眼睛和嘴唇。她穿着一件合身的白色背心，领口较深，下摆刚好在腰部以上，在某些画面中隐约露出腹部。

在这些画面中，她的姿势各不相同：一幅是手轻轻抓住胸前的衣料，另一幅是直立站立，双肩放松，还有一幅是双臂举过头顶，以及一幅是调整上衣下摆。她的表情从平静自信到柔和内省不等。

灯光柔和但直射，类似于机顶闪光灯，在皮肤和织物上营造出柔和的高光，同时保留了自然的纹理。图像中包含可见的胶片颗粒、灰尘和细微瑕疵，增强了复古模拟摄影的美感。整体氛围自信、内敛的感性，并具有永恒感。

风格与品质提示
写实、时尚编辑摄影、胶片样片美学、微妙颗粒感、自然皮肤纹理、高细节、极少修饰

灯光
柔和直射闪光、均匀照明、低环境阴影、真实对比度

相机
中景肖像构图、平视角度、浅景深、35mm 胶片效果

负面提示
夸张的解剖结构、光泽商业照明、过度修饰、塑料感皮肤、卡通或插画风格、AI 伪影、扭曲
prompt_en:
A photorealistic editorial-style portrait composed as a four-frame grid, resembling a contact sheet from a film photoshoot. Each frame features the same young woman posing against a neutral gray studio wall, captured in slightly different natural poses and expressions.
She has voluminous dark hair styled loose with soft movement, strong brows, defined cheekbones, and natural glam makeup emphasizing her eyes and lips. She is wearing a fitted white tank top with a deep neckline, cropped just above the waist, revealing subtle midriff in some frames.
Across the frames, her poses vary: one with a hand lightly gripping the fabric near her chest, another standing straight with relaxed shoulders, another with arms raised above her head, and one adjusting the hem of the top. Her expressions range from calm and confident to softly introspective.
The lighting is soft but direct, similar to on-camera flash, creating gentle highlights on skin and fabric while preserving natural texture. The image includes visible film grain, dust, and minor imperfections, enhancing a vintage analog photography aesthetic. The overall mood is confident, sensual in a restrained editorial way, and timeless.

Style & Quality Cues
Photorealistic, fashion editorial photography, film contact sheet aesthetic, subtle grain, natural skin texture, high detail, minimal retouching

Lighting
Soft direct flash, even illumination, low ambient shadows, realistic contrast

Camera
Medium portrait framing, eye-level angle, shallow depth of field, 35mm film look

Negative Prompt
 exaggerated anatomy, glossy commercial lighting, heavy retouching, plastic skin, cartoon or illustration style, AI artifacts, distortion

title: 年轻女子对着镜子自拍旁边是朱迪
author: @awesome_visuals
prompt: { "subject": "迪士尼商店里一位美丽的年轻女子对着镜子自拍", "outfit": "白色无肩带褶皱迷你连衣裙，珍珠项链", "headwear": "毛茸茸的橙色尼克·王尔德狐狸耳朵帽，绿色眼睛", "phone": "黄色iPhone", "reflection_companion": "她旁边站着一个真人大小的朱迪·霍普斯警官毛绒玩具，身穿制服", "setting": "明亮的疯狂动物城专区，货架上摆满了毛绒玩具，节日彩灯闪烁", "style": "俏皮的眨眼，可爱又略带挑逗的迪士尼自拍" }
prompt_en: { "subject": "beautiful young woman mirror selfie in Disney store", "outfit": "strapless white ruched mini dress, pearl necklace", "headwear": "fluffy orange Nick Wilde fox-ear hat with green eyes", "phone": "yellow iPhone", "reflection_companion": "life-size Judy Hopps police plush in uniform standing next to her", "setting": "bright Zootopia section, shelves packed with plushies, festive lights", "style": "playful wink, cute and flirty Disney selfie" }

title: 云端飞人与隐形战机的史诗空战场景
author: 𝗦𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗺
prompt: 超现实电影场景：我漂浮在半空中，在云层之上坠落，身体倒置，双腿弯曲，双臂微微抬起，身穿黑色连帽衫、黑色裤子、黑色帽子和太阳镜，脚穿 {"shoe color" "red"} 运动鞋，动感十足。两架未来主义隐形战斗机在角色上方和下方近距离飞行，带有动态模糊和热尾迹。高空天空，下方是柔软的云层，白昼电影级光照，角色对焦锐利，广角镜头，史诗级规模，逼真的物理效果，戏剧性构图，4K 画质，无文字，无标志，无水印。
prompt_en: Ultra realistic cinematic scene of my floating and falling in mid air above the clouds, dynamic upside down pose with legs bent and arms slightly raised, wearing black hoodie black pants black cap sunglasses and {"shoe color" "red"} sports shoes, dramatic sense of motion, two futuristic stealth fighter jets flying very close above and below the character with motion blur and heat trails, high altitude sky with soft clouds far below, daylight cinematic lighting, sharp focus on character, wide angle shot, epic scale, realistic physics, dramatic composition, 4k quality, no text, no logo, no watermark

title: Paint scheme comparison image
author: てぃなの＠GPTs好きすぎる人
prompt: So that I can do a paint simulation, make a single image that lets me compare several different patterns.
prompt_en: So that I can do a paint simulation, make a single image that lets me compare several different patterns.

title: 建筑手绘变渲染图（需传参考图）
author: leaderai
prompt: 将图2的风格与细节融入图1的草图中，保持图1的轮廓与构图不变，以写实风格呈现，达到摄影级效果。

title: 街拍女孩自然漫步城市街景
author: Johnn
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "超写实的街头抓拍，与参考图片中是同一个女孩，表情自然，带着浅浅的微笑，自信地走在繁华的城市街道上。以 3/4 步行角度面向镜头，而非完全侧面。金色时段的暖光，头发上带有微妙的轮廓光，浅景深。背景人群略带运动模糊以展现动感，汽车和城市元素柔和模糊，电影感十足。她与参考图片中的面部、发型和年龄都相同。她穿着一件飘逸的印花连衣裙，一件浅米色风衣随风轻摆，淡妆，自然色调。使用全画幅镜头拍摄，50mm，f1.8，真实的皮肤纹理，高细节，主体锐利，背景运动模糊，编辑级街头摄影风格。",
  "negative_prompt": "过度处理的皮肤，塑料脸，玩偶般的眼睛，多余的手指，扭曲，低分辨率，过于戏剧化的光线，卡通，绘画，动漫，身体变形，浓妆，夸张的笑容",
  "style": "电影感，纪实街头摄影，自然色彩分级",
  "camera": {
    "lens": "50mm",
    "aperture": "f1.8",
    "shutter_speed": "1/60",
    "shot_type": "中景人像"
  },
  "quality": "8k，超细节，照片级真实感"
}
```

title: 时尚品牌娃娃
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: 一张超写实的照片，一个时尚娃娃以 [BRAND] 的美学风格，坐在一张带有柔软褶皱的奶油色毛绒床上。这款玩偶的外观反映了该品牌的标志性元素——从头发和服装到配饰——经过精心安排，让人联想到梦幻般的复古风格社论。工作室照明采用温暖的漫射灯光和奶油色的象牙色调调色板，该场景以柔和的玩具屋般的氛围和浅景深模拟奢华时尚摄影。
prompt_en: A hyper-realistic photograph of a fashion doll styled in the aesthetic of [BRAND], sitting on a plush, cream-colored bed with soft folds. The doll’s look reflects the brand’s signature elements — from hair and outfit to accessories — arranged thoughtfully to evoke a dreamy, vintage-inspired editorial. Studio-lit with warm, diffused lighting and a creamy, ivory-toned palette, the scene emulates luxury fashion photography with a soft, dollhouse-like atmosphere and shallow depth of field.

title: 职场沟通表情包套装
author: Cell 细胞
prompt:
参考我提供的IP头像图片作为角色一致性参考。生成16宫格（4x4）表情包大图，每格一个表情，格与格之间留细白边分隔。角色保持相同画风，每格可在底部加短中文文案（2~6字，像素字体/简洁黑字）。除指定小道具外不要加复杂背景。无水印、无额外人物。
16格内容依次为：....

title: 景观节点3D分析图
author: LeaderAI
prompt: 生态水净化系统的等轴3D剖面图，描绘为一个立方体块。顶层是茂密的绿色植被，特别是混合了芦苇和带有棕色顶部的香蒲。侧视图是一个剖面，显示了清澈的水层和底部的土壤沉积层，模仿玻璃缸的效果。干净的建筑可视化风格，科学插画，白色背景，柔和的全局照明，高细节，8k分辨率。并且添加说明和解释，索引线标出，文字信息丰富密集，1024×1024像素

title: 快乐的瞬间：都市生活中的美好一天
author: IqraSaifiii

title: 自己的国家地标时尚杂志
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: 以 [COUNTRY] 风格设计的豪华时尚杂志封面，融合了标志性地标、文化符号和当地时尚美学。布局模仿高端编辑设计，标题的灵感来自该国的语言、趋势和生活方式。精致的电影级灯光，垂直 9：16 格式，超细节，Vogue 级别的优雅
prompt_en: a luxurious fashion magazine cover designed in the style of [COUNTRY], blending iconic landmarks, cultural symbols, and local fashion aesthetics. The layout mimics high-end editorial design, with headlines inspired by the country’s language, trends, and lifestyle. Sophisticated, cinematic lighting, vertical 9:16 format, ultra-detailed, Vogue-level elegance

title: 4‑panel manga of a girl streaming from a yakuza mansion
author: 小倉＠医療系Pythonプログラム開発サポート
prompt:
Create a 4‑panel manga with the girl in the first image, {argument name="protagonist_name_en" default="Hoshina"}, as the main character.
The story is that she barges into a mansion rumored to be inhabited by scary {argument name="opponent_type_en" default="yakuza"} and does a livestream from there.

The man in the second image is {argument name="male_role_en" default="a reference sheet showing the yakuza’s traits"}.
{argument name="protagonist_name_en_again" default="Hoshina"} speaks in first person as “Atashi,” and she is a strong‑willed, selfish girl.
prompt_en:
Create a 4‑panel manga with the girl in the first image, {argument name="protagonist_name_en" default="Hoshina"}, as the main character.
The story is that she barges into a mansion rumored to be inhabited by scary {argument name="opponent_type_en" default="yakuza"} and does a livestream from there.

The man in the second image is {argument name="male_role_en" default="a reference sheet showing the yakuza’s traits"}.
{argument name="protagonist_name_en_again" default="Hoshina"} speaks in first person as “Atashi,” and she is a strong‑willed, selfish girl.

title: 比莉·艾利什黑白时尚大片：皮革夹克与湿发造型的高级质感肖像
author: Mikasa

title: 容器中的人类生存困境
author: ttmouse - 豆爸
prompt:
{
  "creative_id": "contained-human-aquarium-reverse-002",
  "creation_intent": "provoke",
  "generation_logic": "character-centric",
  "creative_world": "concept_art",
  "deliverable_type": "conceptual_editorial_visual",
  "entry_point": "person",
  "core_tension": "{"核心张力" "被保护的生存条件 vs 被剥夺的主体自由"}",
  "twist_mechanisms": [
    "containerization",
    "scale_misalignment",
    "cross-species-normalization",
    "visible_power_hand",
    "artificial_environment_substitution"
  ],
  "subject_kit": {
    "primary_subject": "被容器化、被管理的人类生命",
    "secondary_elements": [
      "透明塑料水袋作为临时生命系统",
      "明显大于主体的人类之手作为权力来源",
      "金鱼作为被默认容器化的对照生命",
      "水体作为非自然却维生的替代环境"
    ]
  },
  "stage_context": "完全抽离现实的概念摄影棚空间，背景被压缩为单一色场以消除时间与地点",
  "composition_rule": "垂直悬挂的单一容器构成绝对视觉中心，内部主体被强制纳入同一生存尺度",
  "lighting_rule": "均质、无方向偏见的照明，强化展示与观察属性，刻意回避情绪渲染",
  "imaging_assumption": "editorial_concept_photography",
  "implicit_constraints": {
    "must_have": [
      "清晰可见的透明容器边界",
      "人类与其他被饲养生命的并置",
      "外部权力的物理介入痕迹",
      "非自然但可存活的生存介质"
    ],
    "must_not_have": [
      "自然水域或真实环境线索",
      "叙事性背景或时间暗示",
      "主体主动反抗或戏剧化表情",
      "任何模糊权力来源的构图"
    ]
  },
  "failure_modes": [
    "容器不再具备廉价与临时性而显得高级",
    "权力关系变得隐晦或消失",
    "主体被表现为主动选择被容纳",
    "画面转向奇幻或装饰性表达而非现实替代",
    "人类与金鱼不再处于同一生存逻辑层级"
  ]
}

title: 海滩写真拍摄
author: @IqraSaifiii

title: 充满活力的花海户外时尚写真
author: @sidona
prompt: 使用附图，在阳光明媚的户外，以繁花似锦的花田为背景，拍摄一张引人注目的时尚人像。照片采用数码相机拍摄，并使用强光闪光灯。相机角度较低并略微向上倾斜，增强了画面的活力和戏剧性。人物周围环绕着色彩艳丽的大朵罂粟花，黄色、粉色和橙色交相辉映，有的位于前景，有的位于背景，营造出沉浸式的花海效果。湛蓝的天空提供了清爽而对比鲜明的背景。整体氛围大胆、时尚且充满奇思妙想，使服装和花朵的鲜艳色彩在宁静的天空映衬下格外醒目。照片的整体构图应营造出一种既俏皮又时尚的氛围，并带有一丝超现实主义色彩，通过直接闪光灯拍摄来强调质感和色彩。
prompt_en: Use this photo attached to create a striking outdoor fashion portrait set in a vibrant flower field during daylight, captured with a digital camera using a harsh flash. The camera angle is low and slightly tilted upward, intensifying the scene's energy and drama. Surrounding the subject are large, colorful poppies in yellow, pink, and orange, some in the foreground and others in the background, creating an immersive field-of-flowers effect. The sky is clear and blue, providing a crisp, contrasting backdrop. The mood is bold, editorial, and whimsical, making the vibrant colors of the outfit and flowers pop starkly against the serene sky. The overall composition should evoke a playful yet high-fashion atmosphere with a hint of surrealism, emphasizing texture and color through the use of direct flash photography.

title: 透明塑料袋装物体
author: @azed_ai
prompt: A high-resolution photograph of a clear plastic drawstring bag placed on a light gray background. Inside the bag are multiple tiny 3D [subject] figures arranged neatly. The bag is tied with a soft white ribbon and has a black label tag that reads ‘[LABEL TEXT]’. Soft lighting and clean shadows emphasize the realistic textures and details
prompt_en: A high-resolution photograph of a clear plastic drawstring bag placed on a light gray background. Inside the bag are multiple tiny 3D [subject] figures arranged neatly. The bag is tied with a soft white ribbon and has a black label tag that reads ‘[LABEL TEXT]’. Soft lighting and clean shadows emphasize the realistic textures and details

title: 极简风面部精油产品摄影展示
author: Oogie
prompt: 超逼真极简主义影棚产品摄影，画面中央放置一个小的透明玻璃面部精华油滴管瓶，瓶盖为黑色橡胶吸管帽，内含淡粉色精华液，其中悬浮着干粉色花瓣。滴管瓶置于一个天然原木立方体块的顶部，木块纹理清晰，带有裂纹质感。立方体左侧立着一个高大的哑光白色长方形护肤品盒，盒身印有极简的黑色文字“HUILE ÉCLAT VISAGE”，品牌设计简洁现代，底部有细微的标志。立方体右侧是一个透明圆柱形玻璃花瓶，瓶中注水，插着纤细的干粉色满天星花枝，向上和向外延伸。整个构图置于一个光滑的哑光柔和粉色表面上，背景是匹配的柔和粉色无缝影棚背景。强烈的定向柔光从左侧射入，在粉色背景上投射出花朵和物体的长而柔和的写实阴影。灯光为自然风格，柔和漫射，温暖，在玻璃上营造出柔和的高光，精华瓶上呈现出微妙的反射，木块上则有柔和的纹理。相机角度为桌面高度的正面直拍，中景构图，所有主要物体都清晰对焦，景深模糊极小。色彩以腮红粉、柔和玫瑰色调、暖色木质、纯净白色和透明玻璃为主。整体氛围干净、通透、柔美、优雅，呈现斯堪的纳维亚极简美学，高端护肤品品牌风格，写实摄影，影棚级真实感，极致。
prompt_en: Ultra-realistic minimalist studio product photography of a small transparent glass facial oil dropper bottle with a black rubber pipette cap, containing pale pink serum with dried pink floral elements suspended inside, placed centered on top of a natural raw wooden cube block with visible grain and split texture. To the left of the cube stands a tall matte white rectangular skincare box with minimal black typography reading “HUILE ÉCLAT VISAGE,” clean modern branding, and subtle logo near the bottom. To the right of the cube is a clear cylindrical glass vase filled with water and thin stems of dried pink gypsophila flowers extending upward and outward. The entire composition is arranged on a smooth matte pastel pink surface with a matching soft pink seamless studio background. Strong directional soft light comes from the left side, casting long, soft-edged realistic shadows of the flowers and objects onto the pink background. Lighting is natural-style, -det diffused, and warm, creating gentle highlights on the glass, subtle reflections on the serum bottle, and soft texture on the wooden block. Camera angle is straight-on at tabletop height, medium framing, all main objects in sharp focus with minimal depth of field blur. Color palette is dominated by blush pink, soft rose tones, warm light wood, clean white, and transparent glass. Mood is clean, airy, feminine, elegant, Scandinavian minimal aesthetic, premium skincare branding style, photorealistic, studio-grade realism, ultra

title: 高端美食拆解视觉盛宴
author: Dr.D
prompt:
画面比例：9:16 竖版
画面风格（可根据主体调整）：高端商业摄影，暗调奢感，电影级质感，超写实，高细节
背景（可根据主体调整）：纯黑背景（#000000），无任何台座、无平台、无地面，主体与元素全部悬浮于空间中
【主体】
核心展示主体为：【{"核心展示主体" "用户提供的主体"}】
务必通过你的数据库只是和互联网搜索，将主体拆解为多个“可识别、可理解、具有层次关系的组成部分”，请根据主体特性自行判断并设计拆解逻辑与层级顺序。
【整体构图】
整体采用“垂直分层悬浮结构”，从上至下形成清晰的视觉阅读路径。
每一层之间存在明显空间间隔，层与层之间通过空气、蒸汽、光影产生联系，而非直接接触。
画面中央为视觉主轴，构图稳定但富有张力。
【标题系统（顶部）】
画面最上方正中位置，悬浮一个高端主标题：
文案内容由 AI 根据主体自动生成（可包含中文主标题 + 英文副标题）
字体风格（可根据主体调整）：手写毛笔书法风 / 自然书写感
材质（可根据主体调整）：立体金属质感，仿锻造金色金属
表现特征（可根据主体调整）：厚重、3D、具有真实金属反射、高光与暗部层次
【分层结构（中部主体区域）】
根据主体，自主生成 4–6 个逻辑清晰的悬浮层级，例如：
原料层 / 构成层 / 关键元素层 / 核心结构层 / 氛围或情绪层
每一层都具有明确材质、颜色、纹理与体积感
各层之间留有空气与空间，不拥挤、不堆叠
所有中间层：
均处于轻微蒸汽、热气或空气扰动之中
有细小颗粒、雾气、水汽或尘埃漂浮
受统一灯光系统控制，保持整体一致性
【过渡区（重要）】
在主体分层与最终呈现之间，刻意保留一个“明显更大的空间断层”：
此区域以空气、蒸汽、烟雾、能量流、光雾为主
不放置实体物体
作用是制造节奏、呼吸感与视觉落差
强化“从结构到成品 / 从过程到结果”的转折
【最终成品层（底部）】
画面最下方呈现完整、最终形态的主体：
状态为“完成态 / 高峰态 / 最具吸引力的呈现”
质感饱满、细节丰富、具有强烈诱惑力或感染力
与背景自然融合，但清晰突出
从该区域向上持续产生蒸汽、烟雾或能量感
【信息标注系统】
在画面中适度加入说明性标注：
中英文双语
文字克制、优雅
使用细线或箭头指向对应层级
标注内容由 AI 根据主体自动生成
不喧宾夺主，只起“高级解读”作用
【署名 / 品牌元素】
画面右下角：
悬浮一个品牌署名或签名式 Logo
风格与主标题一致（毛笔字感、金属金色、立体等）
可搭配轻微星光、微闪效果，强调高级感
在底部有一句针对主体的一句话商业爆款SLOGAN
【光影系统】
45° 方向专业影棚灯光
暖色轮廓光（rim light）勾勒结构边缘
局部高光突出材质真实感
蒸汽与烟雾被灯光切割，形成体积光
【整体气质】
暗调、克制、昂贵  或底部一侧（可根据主体调整）
具有“灵魂感 / 温度 / 手工感 / 高级商业审美”
适用于品牌海报、主视觉、封面级商业展示

title: 暗黑科幻动作大片角色定妆照
author: Sharon Riley

title: 红妆剪影金辉玉颜
author: @ttmouse
prompt:
1. 宏观风格与媒介
- 核心媒介: 高清商业人像摄影 (High-end Commercial Photography)
- 美学流派: 新中式美学 (New Chinese Style), 节日时尚大片

2. 主体与IP身份
- 核心主体: 年轻东亚女性侧颜特写 (Close-up profile of young Asian woman)
- IP/名人锁定: 穿着红色旗袍 (Red Cheongsam), 佩戴珍珠项链与红色花卉耳环

3. 世界逻辑与物理
- 物理法则: 真实光学投影 (Real optical projection), 面部光影贴合面部起伏
- 空间构成: 人眼平视视角 (Eye-level), 极近距离接触

4. 数据与信息层
- 文本提取: 无文本
- 品牌与符号: 红色剪纸艺术前景 (Red paper-cut art foreground) - 包含仙鹤、蝴蝶与牡丹纹样

5. 材质与纹理
- 核心材质: 超写实皮肤质感 (Hyper-realistic skin), 哑光卡纸 (Matte cardstock), 温润珍珠
- 触感细节: 逆光下可见的面部绒毛 (Visible vellus hair backlit), 次表面散射效果 (Subsurface scattering)

6. 光影与氛围
- 光照模型: Gobo投影布光 (Gobo lighting/Projected shadows) - 复杂的镂空花纹光影投射在人物面部
- 整体氛围: 金色暖阳侧逆光 (Warm golden hour light), 高饱和度喜庆红调, 梦幻且清晰

7. 技术参数
- 镜头与渲染: 85mm-100mm 微距镜头 (Macro lens), 浅景深 (Shallow depth of field), 前景虚化 (Bokeh foreground)
- 构图指令: 框式构图 (Framed composition), --ar 3:4

title: 一幅某某角色的素描
author: @CharaspowerAI
prompt: 一幅[角色]的素描，用蜡笔画在白纸上，风格类似儿童绘本插图——简单、可爱、色彩丰富，带有[两种闪光点缀色]闪光点缀和高细节。
prompt_en: a drawing of [Character], crayon on white paper, in the style of a children's book illustration – simple, cute, and full-color, with [two glitter accent colors] glitter accents and high detail.

title: 冬日暖光下的电影感肖像
author: Taaruk

title: 新中式春节女性肖像摄影提示词
author: ttmouse - 豆爸
prompt:
确保图像中的人物保持照片的面部特征。

主体：
年轻的东亚女性，特写肖像。
表情：浅笑，脸部正对镜头。
特征：皮肤质地细腻通透，妆容自然清透。

发型、妆容与配饰：
发型：黑发向后梳并盘起。
发饰：头发上精心装饰着 {"hair accessory color" "红色"} 的中国传统剪纸艺术品，图案简洁雅致。
珠宝：佩戴单串珍珠项链，耳垂上戴着小巧的金色耳钉。

服装：
{"attire style" "红色丝绸旗袍"}（旗袍），带有传统立领和盘扣细节。

光线：
暖色侧光（黄金时段），光源从画面左侧进入。
光线在面部和颈部投下柔和温暖的阴影，营造出立体感和光泽感。
高对比度，温暖、喜庆、亲密的氛围。

构图与环境：
垂直构图。
前景：画面左侧被虚焦（散景）的较厚红色剪纸艺术品（花枝图案）环绕，增加景深。
背景：深红色，纯净且模糊的背景。也包含一些光影效果。
浅景深，焦点集中在人物的面部和眼睛。

风格与媒介：
高质量商业肖像摄影，电影级灯光效果。
新中式美学，喜庆氛围（中国新年）。
8K 分辨率，超高清细节。
prompt_en:
确保图像中的人物维持照片的五官 

主体 (Subject):
年轻东亚女性，特写肖像。
表情：温柔地微笑着，脸部正对着相机
特征：皮肤质感细腻通透，自然清透的妆容。

妆发与配饰 (Hair, Makeup & Accessories):
发型：黑发向后梳理盘起。
头饰：头发上精心装饰着{"头饰颜色" "红色"}的中国传统剪纸艺术品，简洁大气的纹样。
首饰：佩戴一条单串珍珠项链，耳垂上有小巧的金色耳钉。

服装 (Attire):
{"服装款式" "红色丝绸旗袍"}（Qipao），带有传统立领和盘扣细节。

光影 (Lighting):
暖色调侧光（黄金时刻），光源从画面左侧打入。
光线在面部和颈部投下柔和、温暖的阴影，营造出立体感和发光感。
高对比度，氛围温暖、喜庆且私密。

构图与环境 (Composition & Environment):
垂直构图 (Vertical orientation)。
前景：画面左侧被失焦（Bokeh）的较粗的红色剪纸艺术（花枝纹样）前景框架所包围，增加层次感。
背景：深红色、纯净且虚化的背景。也有一些光影效果。
浅景深，焦点锐利地集中在人物面部和眼睛。

风格与媒介 (Style & Medium):
高质量商业人像摄影，电影感光效。
新中式美学，节日氛围（春节）。
8k分辨率，超高清细节。

title: Anime female character compilation story in Chinese comic style
author: 吕立青_JimmyLv (闭关ing) 2𐃏25
prompt: Help me generate a compilation story featuring female characters from anime, including {argument name="female_character_list" default="Nami, Robin, Sakura, Hinata, Rangiku Matsumoto"}, in the form of a full-color comic, with all text in Chinese.
prompt_en: Help me generate a compilation story featuring female characters from anime, including {argument name="female_character_list" default="Nami, Robin, Sakura, Hinata, Rangiku Matsumoto"}, in the form of a full-color comic, with all text in Chinese.

title: ZARA购物后咖啡时光
author: LeoIA
prompt: 白色背景，摄影工作室内有一张橡木桌子，桌上放着一个印有ZARA标志的白色纸袋。还有一个白色、带有蓝色陶瓷装饰的盘子，盘子上铺着纸巾，上面放着一个巧克力牛角面包。此外，还配有叉子和刀。

title: 复古闺房里的极致沙漏身材自拍
author: @ZephyraLeigh

title: 日系模特全身时尚造型
author: Ankit_patel211
prompt: Grok想象（Grok AI）一款日本年轻模特的全身魅力造型，搭配橄榄绿印花长袖宽松衬衫，复古图案，宽松合身。高腰黑色阔腿裤，轮廓流畅，体积巨大。黑色厚底厚底厚鞋。银链腰带作为腰部的点缀。复古混合风格，复古花卉和现代轮廓。图案和纹理对比的折衷美学。不是极简主义风格，不是明亮的霓虹色，不是合身的衣服。@Kuso照片

Grok imagine (Grok AI)

A Japanese young Model full body glamour look shot with olive Green floral print long-sleeved open loosely shirt with vintage pattern and relaxed fit. High-waisted black wide-leg trousers with flowing silhouette and dramatic volume. Black platform shoes with chunky sole. Silver chain belt as waist accent.
Vintage mix style with retro floral and
modern silhouettes. Eclectic aesthetic with pattern and texture contrast. NOT minimalist styling, NOT bright neon colors, NOT fitted clothing.

@KusoPhoto

title: 动漫角色横幅设计模板
author: てんねん
prompt:
# ===== 用户控制 =====
title_text: "{"显示字符串" "<<你的文本>>"}"
title_style_preset: "{"标志设计预设" "cool"}" # cool, cute, cool_cute, luxury, pop, cyber, minimal, retro, kawaii
face_zoom: "{"面部缩放开/关" "off"}" # off, on

subject: >
  使用提供的参考图像内容，创建一个 21:6 的宽幅横幅。
  主要面部必须在不可见的“安全区域”（不绘制）内居中，
  并且标题标志（由 title_text + title_style_preset 生成）必须放置在同一安全区域内。

composition: >
  长宽比 21:6。
  不可见的安全区域（请勿绘制）：
  - 左边距：宽度的 15%
  - 右边距：宽度的 15%
  - 上边距：高度的 16%
  - 下边距：高度的 16%
  将整个面部和整个标题标志完全保持在此安全区域内。
  背景可以延伸到边缘。

action: >
  以最高保真度放置参考图像内容。
  自动裁剪/缩放/重新定位以适应 21:6 的横幅，不拉伸。
  检测主要面部（如果有多张面部，选择最大/最突出的）。
  将主要面部在安全区域内水平和垂直居中。
  切勿裁剪面部/眼睛；将整个面部舒适地保持在安全区域内（不要靠近边缘）。

  面部缩放行为：
  - 如果 face_zoom 为 OFF：尽可能保持原始构图，同时将面部在安全区域内居中。
  - 如果 face_zoom 为 ON：缩放/裁剪为以面部为中心的半身肖像
    （头部和肩膀可见；包括上半身；不要裁剪）
prompt_en:
# ===== USER CONTROLS =====
title_text: "{"表示文字列" "<<YOUR_TEXT>>"}"
title_style_preset: "{"ロゴデザインプリセット" "cool"}"  # cool, cute, cool_cute, luxury, pop, cyber, minimal, retro, kawaii
face_zoom: "{"ズームのon/off" "off"}"            # off, on

subject: >
  Create a 21:6 wide banner using the provided reference image content.
  The primary face must be centered inside an invisible safe zone (not drawn),
  and a title logo (derived from title_text + title_style_preset) must be placed inside the same safe zone.

composition: >
  Aspect ratio 21:6.
  Invisible safe zone (DO NOT draw it):
  - Left margin: 15% of width
  - Right margin: 15% of width
  - Top margin: 16% of height
  - Bottom margin: 16% of height
  Keep the entire face AND the entire title logo fully inside this safe zone.
  Background may extend to the edges.

action: >
  Place the reference image content with maximum fidelity.
  Auto-crop/scale/reposition to fit a 21:6 banner with no stretching.
  Detect the primary face (if multiple faces, pick the largest/most prominent).
  Center the primary face within the safe zone both horizontally and vertically.
  Never crop off the face/eyes; keep the full face comfortably inside the safe zone (not near edges).

  Face zoom behavior:
  - If face_zoom is OFF: keep the original framing as much as possible while still centering the face in the safe zone.
  - If face_zoom is ON: zoom/crop to a bust-up portrait centered on the face
    (head and shoulders visible; include upper chest; do no

title: Realistic character design sheet from a photo
author: GNUmotion | AIVideo
prompt:
Please create a detailed character design sheet of the person in this photo. It will be used in a live-action movie, so be careful not to make it look like anime-style artwork. Be sure to structure it with the following three character elements:
 - A turnaround (three-view) sheet showing the character from multiple angles
 - An expression sheet showing basic emotional states such as joy, sadness, anger, surprise, fear, and neutral
 - A pose sheet showing typical actions, such as the character running, jumping, laughing, and crying

Once it is created, remove the original image of the person.
prompt_en:
Please create a detailed character design sheet of the person in this photo. It will be used in a live-action movie, so be careful not to make it look like anime-style artwork. Be sure to structure it with the following three character elements:
 - A turnaround (three-view) sheet showing the character from multiple angles
 - An expression sheet showing basic emotional states such as joy, sadness, anger, surprise, fear, and neutral
 - A pose sheet showing typical actions, such as the character running, jumping, laughing, and crying

Once it is created, remove the original image of the person.

title: 窗边光影人像写真
author: 𝗦𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮

title: 悉尼主题时尚写真，甜酷风格人像摄影
author: ANKIT PATEL 🇮🇳 | AI
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "一位湿发、深色头发的女性，蹲下身，左手拿着一支粉色棒棒糖，右手轻触颈部，右食指戴着一枚大戒指，身穿一件{\"top color\" \"red\"}抹胸上衣、牛仔夹克、牛仔短裤和红色高筒厚底靴，前景是巨大的白色 3D 字母“SYDNEY”，背景是粉色和蓝色的渐变。",
  "subject": "湿发、深色头发的女性蹲下身，拿着一支粉色棒棒糖",
  "environment": "类似工作室的粉蓝色渐变背景",
  "style": "写实照片",
  "lighting": "柔和、均匀的工作室灯光，突出色彩",
  "camera": {
    "angle": "平视",
    "distance": "中景",
    "depth_of_field": "浅景深",
    "focus": "聚焦于女性的脸部、棒棒糖以及前景中巨大的“SYDNEY”字母"
  },
  "composition": {
    "framing": "主体居中，带前景元素",
    "subject_placement": "女性居中，略微偏离中心蹲下，以适应前景文字",
    "foreground": "巨大的白色 3D 字母“SYDNEY”占据画面下三分之一",
    "background": "平滑的粉蓝色渐变，干净整洁",
    "negative_space": "主体和字母周围均匀的色彩渐变，保持构图简洁，除了“SYDNEY”之外无其他文字"
  },
  "mood": "俏皮大胆",
  "color_palette": [
    "粉色",
    "蓝色",
    "红色",
    "白色",
    "牛仔蓝"
  ],
  "technical": {
    "render_type": "照片"
  }
}
```
prompt_en:
{
  "prompt": "A woman with wet, dark hair crouching down holding a pink lollipop in her left hand, right hand touching her neck with a large ring on her right index finger, wearing a {\"top color\" \"red\"} tube top, denim jacket, denim shorts, and tall red platform boots, large white 3D letters spelling \"SYDNEY\" in the foreground, background gradient of pink and blue",
  "subject": "woman with wet dark hair crouching, holding a pink lollipop",
  "environment": "studio-like gradient background of pink and blue",
  "style": "realistic photo",
  "lighting": "soft, even studio lighting emphasizing colors",
  "camera": {
    "angle": "eye-level",
    "distance": "medium shot",
    "depth_of_field": "shallow",
    "focus": "on the woman's face, lollipop, and the large \"SYDNEY\" letters in the foreground"
  },
  "composition": {
    "framing": "centered subject with foreground element",
    "subject_placement": "woman centered, crouching slightly off-center to accommodate foreground text",
    "foreground": "large white 3D letters spelling \"SYDNEY\" occupying lower third of frame",
    "background": "smooth pink-to-blue gradient, clean and uncluttered",
    "negative_space": "even color gradient around subject and letters to keep composition clean and text-free aside from \"SYDNEY\""
  },
  "mood": "playful and bold",
  "color_palette": [
    "pink",
    "blue",
    "red",
    "white",
    "denim blue"
  ],
  "technical": {
    "render_type": "photo"
  }
}

title: 黑白肖像特写，神秘凝视
author: Harboriis
prompt:
一位男子面部特写黑白肖像，眼神锐利，部分脸庞隐藏在纹理深色外套的高领后。短发和苍白的皮肤在戏剧性的光线下被清晰勾勒，面部形成深邃的阴影和高对比度。皮肤和织物的纹理清晰可见，增添了一种触感，几乎是实体的质感。背景全黑，将所有注意力集中在表情和情绪上。电影感；大胆而神秘。自然光，光面纸质感 chaos {"chaos" "45"} style raw

p.470wg66-v-7 -ar 3:4
prompt_en:
Extreme close-up black and white portrait of a man with intense eye contact, partially hiding his face behind the high collar of a textured dark coat. His short-cropped hair and pale skin are sharply defined under dramatic lighting, creating deep shadows and high contrast across the face. The texture of the skin and fabric is clearly visible, adding a tactile, almost tangible quality. The background is completely black, focusing all attention on the expression and mood. Cinematic; bold, and mysterious. Natural light, glossy paper feel chaos {"chaos" "45"} style raw

p.470wg66-v-7 -ar 3:4

title: 都市街头时尚青年写真
author: Hatman 🎩
prompt: 创作一张超写实、单反电影风格的全身肖像，描绘一位时尚的年轻男子，他五官棱角分明，神情自信，姿态充满活力。他身穿一件宽松的做旧深棕色和米色拼布针织毛衣，毛衣带有对比鲜明的粗缝线、刻意磨损的破洞以及长长的垂坠绳索或抽绳，营造出一种原始、前卫的风格，下身搭配黑色宽松工装裤。他戴着黑色包耳式“gloomyboy”风格耳机，有清晰可见的线缆连接，手上戴着一枚简约的金属戒指。整体呈现编辑街头时尚美学，注重超精细的织物纹理、真实的肤色、细微的胶片颗粒感、电影级的色彩分级、浅景深、高对比度，以及一种忧郁而又不失时尚的氛围。
prompt_en: Create a hyper-realistic DSLR cinematic full-body portrait of a stylish young man with sharp, well-defined facial features and a confident, dynamic pose. He wears an oversized distressed dark brown and beige patchwork knit sweater with contrasting thick stitching, intentional worn holes, and long hanging cords or drawstrings for a raw, avant-garde look, paired with black relaxed-fit cargo pants. He has black over-ear “gloomyboy” style headphones with a clearly visible wired connection and a minimal metal ring on his hand. Editorial street-fashion aesthetic with ultra-detailed fabric textures, realistic skin tones, subtle film grain, cinematic color grading, shallow depth of field, high contrast, and a moody yet stylish atmosphere.

title: 卡通风格文本标志
author: @gnrlyxyz
prompt: Create a bold, warped cartoon-style text design with two distinct layers. The top layer should say “SUPER GNARLY” in warped bubble letters with a melty, drippy texture, like ghost slime or goo. The letters should feel heavy and organic, with a slightly psychedelic or paranormal vibe. The bottom layer should say “SOCIETY” in much smaller, script-like or handwritten-style letters that tuck underneath or nestle between the larger title letters. Both layers should be solid white with thick black outlines. No gradients, shading, or texture. Layout should be playful and a little chaotic, but still readable. Vector friendly. Blue background. Square aspect ratio.
prompt_en: Create a bold, warped cartoon-style text design with two distinct layers. The top layer should say “SUPER GNARLY” in warped bubble letters with a melty, drippy texture, like ghost slime or goo. The letters should feel heavy and organic, with a slightly psychedelic or paranormal vibe. The bottom layer should say “SOCIETY” in much smaller, script-like or handwritten-style letters that tuck underneath or nestle between the larger title letters. Both layers should be solid white with thick black outlines. No gradients, shading, or texture. Layout should be playful and a little chaotic, but still readable. Vector friendly. Blue background. Square aspect ratio.

title: 赛博朋克风格女性肖像，冷暖双色光影，复古墨镜，高质感写真
author: Kashberg
prompt: 一位年轻女性的超逼真电影感肖像，戴着圆形复古太阳镜，嘴角带着一丝自信的微笑，头发向后扎起，面部轮廓清晰对称。戏剧性的分割光线，一侧是 {"cool color" "冷蓝色"} 调，另一侧是 {"warm color" "暖红色"} 边缘光，深海军蓝背景。使用高端单反相机拍摄，85mm 镜头，浅景深，清晰的皮肤纹理，高对比度，赛博朋克黑色电影氛围，时尚杂志风格，简洁构图，影棚品质，超细节，8K 真实感。
prompt_en: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a young woman wearing round vintage sunglasses, subtle confident smile, hair tied back, sharp facial symmetry. Dramatic split lighting with {"cool color" "cool blue"} tones on one side and {"warm color" "warm red"} rim light on the other, dark navy background. Shot on a premium DSLR, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, crisp skin texture, high contrast, cyber-noir mood, fashion editorial style, clean composition, studio quality, ultra-detailed, 8K realism.
